free_text: Neutron capture cross section measurements for natLu
with different thickness
Inner Mongolia Minzu University, Tongliao
The Back-n white neutron source at
China Spallation Neutron Source (CSNS)
Two natural lutetium samples (purity 99%, including
1% of 181Ta) with diameter of 30.0 mm, thicknesses of
1.06 mm and 0.207 mm, weight of 7373.11 mg and
1439.84 mg, area density of 0.00358820 atom/b and
0.000700715 atom/b respectively.
The Back-n C6D6 detector system consists of
four C6D6 liquid scintillation detectors (EJ315) and
ET9390KB photomultiplier. The C6D6 detectors central
axis is at an angle of 125 degree from the neutron
beam. The distance between the C6D6 detectors front
center to the sample target center was 144 mm.
Flight distance of 76 m.
Weighting function calculated by Geant4.
Absolute normalization to the Au 4.9 eV saturated
resonance.
No information
Fig.6 of Acta Physica Sinica,71,072901,2022
Data were obtained from AUTHOR
The data received from Zhang Su-Ya-La-Tu
Jimin Wang (CNDC)
